attributes.action: Make the PM answer all questions at PM’s question time.
attributes.additional_details: PM’s question time has made our government look like a school ground. It’s about time for our PM and MP’s to act professionally. They are front and central for the world to see. I want a judicator intervene when the people question chooses not to answer the questions and stop the personal rants instead. Maybe we should have a sin bin? But, this behaviour has no place in politics.
attributes.background: PM’s question time has brought embarrassment to the people of the UK. Seldom does he ever answer the questions put to him but just uses it for cheap attacks on the person who raised the questions.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762566
